widgets_values:
A highly detailed, cinematic group portrait featuring three distinct fantasy-archetype figures standing in a dimly lit, gothic stone chamber. The central focus is a striking young woman with pale skin and a sleek, chin-length black bob hairstyle. She wears an intricate, form-fitting ensemble combining glossy black molded leather armor with billowing white silk fabric and a red interior lining. A prominent red gemstone is set in gold filigree at her neckline, and a gold mechanical skull accessory hangs from her utility belt. She stares intensely at the camera with piercing blue-grey eyes, her black-gloved hands relaxing at her sides.
Flanking her are two contrasting figures. To the left stands a handsome young man with tousled dark blonde hair and light stubble, dressed in a worn beige trench coat over a black shirt, clutching a leather-bound book against his chest with a concerned expression. To the right stands a menacing, enigmatic figure completely shrouded in a black hooded cloak and a dark mask, appearing as a silhouette against the stone wall. In the bottom right foreground, a pile of old, yellowed human skulls sits on the stone floor. The background features a large, arched gothic window letting in cool, blue-white daylight that creates a misty, atmospheric backlight. The primary lighting is soft and cinematic, highlighting the textures of the leather and the woman's face. Captured with an 85mm portrait lens, sharp focus on the central woman, with a slight fall-off in focus on the background architecture.

nodes.title: Original color PiD save when using loras
Positive Prompt
widgets_values:
An epic, dramatic wide shot of a powerful female silhouette ascending vertically into a blinding, infinite crimson void. Her body is a sharp, elegant dark form, completely backlit by a colossal source of light, emphasizing her graceful posture of mid-flight ascent. Spanning outward from her shoulders are a pair of enormous, majestic black feathered wings, fully spread to the edges of the frame. The wings are composed of thick, layered, ink-black feathers, with the outermost tips and edges violently ignited in crackling, intensely hot red fire that licks against the dark air, casting flickering orange highlights across the wing structure.
Blinding, volumetric rays of hellish, deep-crimson and molten-orange light radiate outward in sharp beams from directly behind her body, piercing through swirling layers of thick, dark soot and smoke. A dense cloud of glowing, semi-translucent embers and burning hot ash floats upward from the unseen depths below, caught in the massive thermal updraft generated by the slow, powerful beating of her fiery wings. The light physics are intense and high-contrast, with the blinding glare of the background creating a soft, burning light-bleed around her dark silhouette, illuminating the fine, microscopic details of smoke particles and heat distortion waves in the air.
This dramatic backlit composition is captured from an extreme low angle, looking directly upward to emphasize her ascendant, powerful presence. The atmosphere feels suffocating, hot, and ancient, with the endless red void fading into deep, impenetrable shadows at the very bottom of the frame. Shot on a high-end 24mm anamorphic lens, the photograph exhibits natural optical characteristics, including subtle lens flare, heavy bloom around the most intense light sources, and a shallow depth of field that keeps the central fiery feathers razor-sharp while the distant rays and rising smoke gently blur into a painterly, majestic abstraction.

Running full steps = degrade_sigma .10

Running 1 step before full = .38
SplitSigmas=BasicScheduler steps-1

432 576 512>2048 Portrait 3:4

768 1024 1024>4096 Portrait 3:4
Most portrait resolutions for 1024>4096 produce green artifact at the bottom, this works 99% of the time
